_comment: This file is the canonical, version-controlled record of the branch-protection
rule applied to the 'main' branch of github.com/GanTechProject/VinayakFortune.
Re-applying: gh api -X PUT repos/GanTechProject/VinayakFortune/branches/main/protection --input branch_protection.json
Reading:    gh api repos/GanTechProject/VinayakFortune/branches/main/protection
If the fields below change, update both this file and the rule on GitHub.
POLICY NOTE: This repo is single-human (GanTechProject). GitHub's review model
blocks self-approval of one's own PR, so the 'require pull request review' rule
is set to 1 approval, which physically prevents the owner from merging their own
PRs through the GitHub UI / API. The merge button is intentionally blocked:
either a second human with write access must approve, or the merge must be
performed via a method that bypasses the review rule (currently impossible
on the classic branch-protection API).
When a second human joins, the rule already requires 1 approval -- no edit
needed. If migration to GitHub Repository Rulesets is desired (a separate API
that decouples 'PR required' from 'PR review required'), the ruleset endpoint
supports the finer-grained control.
API gotcha: setting required_pull_request_reviews to null on this endpoint
disables BOTH the 'require PR' and 'require review' rules; they are not
independently toggleable on the classic branch-protection API. Do not null
this field unless you intend to remove the PR requirement entirely.
